expectations.text: Recommends CSS variables for the custom div case
expectations.evidence: Recommends CSS file with var(--h-color-*) and var(--h-spacing-*) for the custom div case

expectations.text: Recommends hearth-tokens/browser for the inline style case
expectations.evidence: import { space, color } from '@utilitywarehouse/hearth-tokens/browser' shown with working example

expectations.text: Does not recommend root hearth-tokens import for inline styles
expectations.evidence: Explicitly shows root import as WRONG with comment 'root import is for Node.js / build-time use only'

expectations.text: Explains why the two approaches differ
expectations.evidence: Explains CSS custom properties approach vs JS import approach; explains root vs /browser subpath distinction
